description: 古风水墨 - 米黄纸 + 朱砂宋体,中式留白美学,适合传统文化 / 人文 / 诗意随笔

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'STSong', 'PingFang SC', serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2b2420; line-height: 2.0; letter-spacing: 0.8px; word-spacing: 2px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #f8f3e8;
styles.h1: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #2b2420; text-align: center; margin: 40px 0 28px; padding: 0 0 18px 0; letter-spacing: 6px; line-height: 1.5; border-bottom: 1px solid #bfa273;
styles.h2: font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; color: #8b2a1f; margin: 40px 0 20px; padding: 0; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 2px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #2b2420; margin: 30px 0 14px; padding: 0 0 0 14px; border-left: 3px solid #8b2a1f; letter-spacing: 1px;
styles.p: margin: 18px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #2b2420; line-height: 2.05;
styles.blockquote: margin: 28px 0; padding: 20px 24px; background: #efe7d4; border-left: 3px solid #8b2a1f; color: #4a3d33; font-size: 15px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 2.0; letter-spacing: 0.6px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 28px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(43,36,32,0.1); border: 1px solid #d8ccae;
styles.code_inline: background: #efe7d4; color: #8b2a1f; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13.5px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #d8ccae;
styles.code_block: background: #2b2420; color: #f0e6d0; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 26px 0; border: none; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 20px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #8b2a1f; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #8b2a1f; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #8b2a1f; margin: 42px 0; opacity: 0.3;
styles.a: color: #8b2a1f; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,42,31,0.5);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 26px 0; font-size: 14.5px; border-top: 2px solid #2b2420; border-bottom: 2px solid #2b2420; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: transparent; color: #2b2420; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2b2420; letter-spacing: 1px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8ccae; color: #2b2420; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 13px; color: #8a7968; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #8b2a1f; letter-spacing: 18px; font-size: 14px; margin: 42px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.5;

list_style.label: A · 朱砂汉字
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: #8b2a1f; color: #f8f3e8; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; min-width: 24px; height: 24px; line-height: 24px; text-align: center; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 1px; font-family: 'KaiTi','STKaiti','楷体',serif;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #8b2a1f; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 12px; font-family: 'KaiTi','STKaiti',serif; font-weight: 700;
